---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

<!-- Clearly describe the feature or improvement you'd like. Why would this be useful? -->

## Problem it solves

<!-- What pain point or limitation does this address? -->

- <!-- Problem 1 -->
- <!-- Problem 2 -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe how this feature should work. High-level is fine; implementation details not required. -->

### Example usage or behavior

<!-- How would a user interact with this feature? -->

```bash
# Example command-line usage:
prog new-feature --option value

# Or assembly:
mov eax, SYS_NEW_FEATURE
mov rbx, arg
int 0x80
```

### User experience mockup (if applicable)

<!-- Screenshots, pseudocode, or text mockups are all welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this problem? Why is this the best approach? -->

## Additional context

- **Related to issue**: <!-- e.g., #123 -->
- **Component**: <!-- e.g., kernel, filesystem, networking, shell, desktop -->
- **Priority**: <!-- low / medium / high -->
- **Effort estimate**: <!-- small (hours) / medium (days) / large (weeks) -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues/PRs to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This aligns with Mellivora OS as an educational/hobby x86-64 OS
- [ ] I understand this may not be accepted if it's out of scope

---

## Questions?

If you'd like to discuss this feature before opening an issue, feel free to start a discussion in the "Discussions" tab.
